metadata.name: Test
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: The royal treasury was plundered and its relics hidden in dungeons across the realm. Reclaim them and return them to the vault in Maplecrest.

towns.name: Maplecrest
towns.description: A sleepy village surrounded by ancient oaks and whispering meadows.

towns.name: Stonekeep
towns.description: A forest clearing settlement where druids and woodsmen live side by side.

key_dungeons.name: Hidden Stronghold
key_dungeons.description: The entrance to Hidden Stronghold gapes like a wound in the hillside. A cold draught carries the scent of damp stone.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Brave the depths of Hidden Stronghold for the Ivory Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Few who enter these halls return unchanged.
